title: Most AI agents are fake (here's a 10-second test)
summary: Jeff Su argues that most AI agents are marketing fiction, proposing a simple test: real generative AI and agentic products must produce novel outputs like text or images, not just classifications or probabilities. He contrasts Gmail's spam filter (not generative) with Google Docs "Help me write" (generative) and notes that true agentic products like Google's Antigravity and Anthropic's Cowork autonomously think and iterate.
